  "findings": [
    "Motor disconnect is not within sight of the motor controller or motor location as required by code."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Relocate the disconnect switch to a compliant location within sight of the motor and driven machinery, or install a lockable disconnect at the controller that complies with the exception."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC Article 430.102 requires a disconnecting means to be located in sight from the motor controller and the motor location. Since the disconnect is not within sight, it poses a severe safety hazard for maintenance personnel and fails inspection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430.102"
  ]
}
